sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n31450" key="ei)soike/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">εἰσοικ-έω</orth>, <sense id="n31450.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">settle in,</tr_> dub. in <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">AP</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">7.320</biblScope> </bibl> (<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Hegesipp.</author></bibl>, leg. <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ἐν</foreign>-).</sense> </entryFree>
